caveats: The raw Pixal3D mesh remains a high-polygon research candidate and requires the normal LOD gate before Unreal import.
decisions.notes: Multiview evidence shows a coherent blue-point Siamese, straight top-view body axis, head aligned with the torso, four distinct grounded limbs, one attached tail, and no large holes. Animation remains a separate gate.

caveats: The raw Pixal3D mesh remains a high-polygon research candidate and requires the normal LOD gate before Unreal import.
decisions.notes: Multiview evidence shows one coherent long-coated Golden Retriever, straight top-view body axis, aligned head and torso, four usable grounded limbs, one attached feathered tail, and no large holes. Animation remains a separate gate.

caveats: The raw Pixal3D mesh remains a high-polygon research candidate and requires the normal LOD gate before Unreal import.
decisions.notes: Multiview evidence shows one coherent apricot Pug with a dark facial mask, straight top-view body axis, aligned short muzzle and torso, four usable grounded limbs, one attached curled tail, and no large holes. Animation remains a separate gate.
